page_metadata.biotools__summary: Add-on to the packages DESeq which ensures the p-value distribution is uniform over the interval [0, 1] for data satisfying the null hypothesis of no differential expression, and uses an adpated Storey-Tibshiran method to calculate q-values.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Add-on to the packages DESeq which ensures the p-value distribution is uniform over the interval [0, 1] for data satisfying the null hypothesis of no differential expression, and uses an adpated Storey-Tibshiran method to calculate q-values.
